ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the website */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the website */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date when the website was launched */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain name of the website */,
  "subdomain" TEXT /* Subdomain of the website */,
  "primary_language" TEXT /* Primary language of the website */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update or modification date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sites_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES site_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trackers" (
  "tracker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracker */,
  "tracker_name" TEXT /* Name of the tracker */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company owning the tracker */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of tracker */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tracker */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update or modification date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trackers_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES tracker_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "internet_penetration" REAL /* Internet penetration rate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update or modification date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company headquarters */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the company */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update or modification date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update or modification date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracker_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracker type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the tracker type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tracker type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update or modification date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monthly_traffic" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website */,
  "requests" INTEGER /* Total number of requests */,
  "unique_visitors" INTEGER /* Number of unique visitors */,
  "page_views" INTEGER /* Total number of page views */,
  "new_visitors" INTEGER /* Number of new visitors */,
  "returning_visitors" INTEGER /* Number of returning visitors */,
  "bounce_rate" REAL /* Bounce rate for the month */,
  "avg_time_on_site" REAL /* Average time spent on the site */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update or modification date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id", "site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "tracker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tracker */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the advertising campaign */,
  "click_through_rate" REAL /* Click-through rate */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate */,
  "campaign_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the advertising campaign */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update or modification date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_performance_tracker_id FOREIGN KEY ("tracker_id") REFERENCES trackers ("tracker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website */,
  "bounce_rate" REAL /* Bounce rate of the website */,
  "avg_session_duration" REAL /* Average session duration */,
  "pages_per_session" INTEGER /* Pages per session */,
  "new_users" INTEGER /* Number of new users */,
  "returning_users" INTEGER /* Number of returning users */,
  "avg_page_depth" INTEGER /* Average number of pages viewed per session */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update or modification date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_delivery" (
  "delivery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content delivery metric */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website */,
  "load_time" REAL /* Page load time */,
  "render_time" REAL /* Page render time */,
  "time_to_interactive" REAL /* Time to interactive */,
  "first_paint_time" REAL /* Time to first paint */,
  "first_contentful_paint" REAL /* Time to first contentful paint */,
  "largest_contentful_paint" REAL /* Time to largest contentful paint */,
  "cumulative_layout_shift" REAL /* Cumulative layout shift */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update or modification date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_delivery_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_metrics" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security metric */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website */,
  "ssl_rating" INTEGER /* SSL rating for the website */,
  "security_headers" INTEGER /* Indicates if security headers are present */,
  "malware_detected" INTEGER /* Indicates if malware was detected */,
  "security_score" INTEGER /* Overall security score */,
  "last_security_audit" TEXT /* Date of the last security audit */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update or modification date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_metrics_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "privacy_metrics" (
  "privacy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each privacy metric */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website */,
  "cookies_used" INTEGER /* Indicates if cookies are used */,
  "third_party_cookies" INTEGER /* Indicates if third-party cookies are used */,
  "tracking" INTEGER /* Indicates if tracking is present */,
  "privacy_score" INTEGER /* Overall privacy score */,
  "last_privacy_audit" TEXT /* Date of the last privacy audit */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update or modification date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("privacy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_privacy_metrics_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)
